name: baysoko-mobile
description: Android wrapper for Baysoko using Capacitor.

scripts.android:init: npx cap add android && node scripts/apply-android-patches.mjs
scripts.android:sync: npx cap sync android && node scripts/apply-android-patches.mjs
scripts.android:prepare: npx cap sync android && node scripts/apply-android-patches.mjs
scripts.android:build:debug: npx cap sync android && node scripts/apply-android-patches.mjs && npx cap open android
